new_findings_this_check.D-2671: 4-star: N=16 holonomic ceiling is architectural, not scale_net capacity. Even d=512 fails. AMM external memory integration now queued. Relevant for Stage 4a — holonomic may need external memory for complex tasks.

pending_ablation.purpose: Validate Stage 4 exit criteria: does global workspace improve attention switching and multi-subsystem coordination?
